subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that thou hast attained unto His boundless favors and bounties, inasmuch as thou hast set thy heart upon the true and ultimate Goal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بالطاف و مواهب بیمنتهای حق فائز شدی چه که قصد مقصود حقیقی نمودی و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
